title: crash on select query from sqlitelogictests
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1 (id Int32, value1 Int32, value2 Float64, name String, active UInt8);
SELECT id FROM tab1 WHERE (value1 > 5) AND (value2 < 30.0) AND (active = 1);
SELECT id FROM tab1 WHERE (value1 < 10) OR (name LIKE 'test%');
key_bug_features: SELECT query with multiple conditions on different columns
